creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jason E. Hale from comment #9)

Wow! I can confirm that installing gstreamer1-plugins-pulse fixes the problem for me as well.

How did you find out that the pulse plugin is the culprit? Did you have a gstreamer debug build?

As for the resolution, it seems unlikely that mkvtoolnix is the only affected port. We might want to add a RUN_DEPENDS for the pulse plugin in qt6-multimedia. WDYT?
Otherwise I'm happy to add one to mkvtoolnix referencing this bug.
